subcodes.first_line: In the letter from His Honor the Overseer - upon him be Bahá'u'lláh's Glory (96) - let him likewise set forth expressions of divine favor from the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در مکتوب جناب ناظر علیه ٩ ٦٦  بهآء الله  هم اظهار عنایت از حق مرقوم دارند
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
